allow: Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try { const p=JSON.parse\(d\); p.query.search.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.title\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERROR'\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try { const p=JSON.parse\(d\); const pages=p.query.pages; const img=Object.values\(pages\)[0]?.thumbnail?.source || 'NOT FOUND'; console.log\('Lima: '+img\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERROR'\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try { const p=JSON.parse\(d\); const pages=p.query.pages; const img=Object.values\(pages\)[0]?.thumbnail?.source || 'NOT FOUND'; console.log\('Cusco Plaza: '+img\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERROR'\); } }\)")
